note: TTS + STT catalog for the cascade engine's voice legs (sibling of lm-models.json). `default` picks the backend each leg uses; override per dev-session with NEXT_PUBLIC_TTS_BACKEND / NEXT_PUBLIC_STT_BACKEND (client-resolved, passed to the routes as `backend`). `envKey` names a fnox/env secret read server-side; empty = keyless local server. The `local` backends expect `mise run audio-local` (mlx-audio server, port 8002). TTS `voiceMap` translates cascade-agent's Mistral voice_id slugs to the local model's preset names (voxtral_tts has 5 English presets: casual_male, casual_female, cheerful_female, neutral_male, neutral_female) — recast personas here. `responseShape`: mistral-json = {audio_data: base64}; audio-bytes = raw audio body (OpenAI-style).
